META_APP_SETTINGS.TITLE: Meta App
META_APP_SETTINGS.DESCRIPTION: Connect Patra to your own Meta developer app for unlimited Facebook page connections and full message privacy.

EMPTY.HEADING: Connect Patra to your Meta app
EMPTY.SUBHEADING: Use your own Meta app for unlimited Facebook page connections + full message privacy.
EMPTY.SECTION_1_HELP: Pick "Other" → "Business". Name it anything ("My Patra App" works).
EMPTY.SECTION_2_TITLE: Add Facebook Login for Business product
EMPTY.SECTION_2_HELP: In your Meta app, left sidebar → Add Product → Facebook Login for Business. In its Settings, add this Valid OAuth Redirect URI:
EMPTY.SAVE_SUCCESS: Meta app validated and saved as {name}.

CONFIGURED.HEADING: Your Meta app is connected
CONFIGURED.DISCONNECT_HINT: This will disconnect {count} Facebook inbox(es) connected via this Meta app. Click again to confirm.
CONFIGURED.BM_TIP_TITLE: Only profile-owned pages can be connected
CONFIGURED.BM_TIP_BODY:
Patra can only connect Facebook pages owned directly by your profile. Pages owned by a Business Manager (a business portfolio) won't appear in the OAuth flow — this is a Facebook platform restriction we can't bypass.

To check which of your pages are owned by a Business Manager, click below. Each business shows how many pages it contains — those pages are blocked.
CONFIGURED.BM_TIP_FOOTNOTE: Pages owned directly by your profile work fine — no action needed for those.

ERRORS.LOAD_FAILED: Could not load Meta app settings.
ERRORS.SAVE_FAILED: Could not save Meta app credentials.
